title: What's New on MedlinePlus

Pneumococcal Disease Tests 
These tests check for the bacteria that cause pneumococcal disease. The tests may be done on blood, urine, sputum, or cerebrospinal fluid samples.
August 30, 2024
Revised and updated MedlinePlus tutorial Evaluating Internet Health Information now available in Spanish
To support Surgeon General Dr. Vivek Murthyâs priority to address health misinformation, MedlinePlus completely revised and updated its tutorial Evaluating Internet Health Information . The new Spanish translation Tutorial de evaluaciÃ³n de informaciÃ³n de salud en internet is now also available.
July 16, 2024
Test Your Knowledge Quizzes Added to MedlinePlus
60 Test Your Knowledge quizzes from the A.D.A.M. Medical Encyclopedia have been added to MedlinePlus. The quizzes focus on health, wellness, disorders, and conditions, and link with relevant MedlinePlus Health Topic pages and Medical Encyclopedia articles, where more information about the topic can be found. Each quiz is comprised of multiple choice and true or false questions. Quiz pages are fully accessible.
January 13, 2023
My MedlinePlus Newsletter Discontinued
The My MedlinePlus newsletter was discontinued as of December 31, 2022. Find trusted, reliable health information written for consumers from the NIH News in Health newsletter and the NIH MedlinePlus Magazine . Follow MedlinePlus on Inst
